name: trendfinder
description: Turn TikTok/Instagram trend data into content decisions inside Cowork. Connects to your Trendfinder data backend (trends, velocity, avatars/DNA, scrape schedules), guides a detect-first onboarding (API key, Apify connector setup, niches, first schedule), and renders the Trendfinder-Cockpit as a Live Artifact with Trends and Avatare tabs. All AI synthesis (briefings, scripts, cluster labels) happens natively in Claude — the backend only stores and scrapes.
